The plan is written to `/Users/timpietrusky/.claude/plans/nifty-jumping-pony.md`. Here's a summary of what will be implemented:

---

## Plan: `@prisma/rest-api-client-generator`

### New package: `packages/rest-api-client-generator/`

A new in-process Prisma generator following the exact same pattern as `client-generator-js` and `client-generator-ts`. It reads DMMF and emits a `fetch`-based TypeScript REST API client.

**Source files:**
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `src/generator.ts` | `RestApiClientGenerator` implements `Generator` interface |
| `src/dmmf-helpers.ts` | DMMF scalar-type→TS mapping, field classifiers (scalar, unique, create-safe) |
| `src/generate-model-types.ts` | 4 interfaces per model via `@prisma/ts-builders` |
| `src/generate-model-client.ts` | `{Model}RestClient` class w/ `findMany/findUnique/create/update/delete` (template strings for bodies) |
| `src/generate-main-client.ts` | Root `RestApiClient` aggregating all model clients |
| `src/generate-rest-client.ts` | Orchestrates writing `{model}.ts` + `index.ts` to `outputDir` |
| `src/__tests__/generator.test.ts` | Vitest snapshot tests |

Plus standard scaffolding: `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `tsconfig.build.json`, `helpers/build.ts` (identical structure to sibling packages).

### 3 small changes to existing files
1. **`packages/client-generator-registry/src/default.ts`** — import + `defaultRegistry.add(new RestApiClientGenerator())` so users can activate with `provider = "prisma-rest-api-client"`
2. **`tsconfig.build.bundle.json`** — one-line path alias for the new package
3. **`.github/workflows/test-template.yml`** — test step in `client-packages` job

### Key design decisions
- **In-process** (no `bin` entry; matches all first-party generators)
- `@prisma/ts-builders` for interface shapes; raw template strings for class method bodies
- Dual CJS+ESM via `adapterConfig` (identical to all sibling packages)
- One generated file per model + a root `index.ts`
